disputed_charges.description: International roaming voice charges — Mexico, March 14-16
International roaming data charges — Mexico, March 14-16

customer_claim: I was not informed that my plan charges $1.00/min and $0.03/MB for roaming. I traveled to Mexico for a work trip and came back to an $87.40 roaming bill. This feels excessive and I was not warned these charges would apply.
